title: Forever Love

segments.text: Dear Lord, You want me as Your bride, all for Your own.
So now my heart I open wide; it’s Yours alone.
An intimate love, affectionate, is all that You’re seeking in me.
To live in Your presence, day by day, in unity.
Part 1:
You have a forever love for me.
I have a forever love for You,
All because of You.
Part 2:
Your love found me, attracted me;
Your endless love has disarmed me.
You’ve poured Your love into my heart to love You.
Your love is like a rushing wave, constraining me
To love You with my very life, no longer free.
O Lord, keep me ever in Your love; Your Word keep empowering me
To love You in body, soul, and strength, with my whole being.
My love for You is not my own; You first loved me.
You are Eternal Love itself and live in me.
The more that I open to Your love, the more love arises in me.
Our love we’ll enjoy forevermore, eternally.
(Chorus Part 1 & Part 2)
You have a forever love for me.
I have a forever love for You.
